entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Journey into the 19th century via novels, short stories, personal narratives, fairy tales, and more. Students engage with a variety of authors and texts from and about the time period and reflect on literary techniques and the characteristics of multiple genres along the way.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Literature: Grade 11, Literature: Grade 12

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Some books shared with other high school grades. Literature, history, and geography lessons work in sync in Grades 9-12, so it is best to consider all three together when placing students.

rows.label: General Lit.: Grades 11-12
rows.books: Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass, The Souls of Black Folk, Up from Slavery, The Count of Monte Cristo, Jane Eyre, James, Short stories and other writings, Things Fall Apart
